title: kayea coriacea
intro: Kayea coriacea, also known as the Kayea tree, is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae. It is a medicinal plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in countries such as Malaysia and Thailand. The medicinal properties of Kayea coriacea include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, offering potential health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced antioxidant defenses.
